title: Molecular Gas Excitation in z ~ 0.7 Gas-Rich Post-starburst Galaxies from SQuIGGLE
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures. Submitted to ApJ, comments welcome!
summary: Many post-starburst galaxies at $z\sim0.7$ have been shown to retain substantial molecular gas reservoirs yet host low ongoing star formation, suggesting that the remaining gas may be inefficient at forming stars during the early post-burst phase. We present new Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array CO(5-4) observations of nine gas-rich post-starburst galaxies at $z\sim0.7$ from the Studying Quenching in Intermediate-z Galaxies: Gas, angu$\vec{L}$ar momentum, and Evolution (SQuIGG$\vec{L}$E) survey, providing a view of the molecular gas excitation in these systems. Combined with existing CO(2-1) data, we detect CO(5-4) in 8/9 targets and find that most have moderate CO excitation with $r_{52}\equiv L'_{\rm CO(5-4)}/L'_{\rm CO(2-1)}\approx0.1-0.3$. These systems show no clear trend between $r_{52}$ and either total or surface-density of star formation. Specifically, all objects have $Σ_{\mathrm{SFR}} \sim 0.01-1\ \text{M}_\odot\ \text{yr}^{-1}\ \text{kpc}^{-2}$, consistent with compact, modest star formation, even when allowing for buried activity, as these galaxies decline from their peak. One object J1448+1010, which has clear optical, mid-infrared, and radio indicators of an active galactic nucleus, is an outlier with $r_{52}\approx0.6$; its elevated excitation likely requires significant non-stellar heating, with a contribution from potentially obscured star formation. Together, most gas-rich SQuIGG$\vec{L}$E post-starbursts have moderately excited molecular gas alongside little to modest star-forming activity, indicating that the remaining gas hosts relatively suppressed star formation efficiencies instead of strong buried starburst activity.

AI.tldr: 对z~0.7的9个富气体后星暴星系进行CO(5-4)观测，发现大多数星系具有中等CO激发水平，且与恒星形成率无明显关联，表明剩余气体中的恒星形成效率相对抑制而非被掩埋的强烈星暴活动。
AI.motivation: 许多z~0.7的后星暴星系保留了大量分子气体但恒星形成率很低，需要研究这些剩余气体的恒星形成效率是否被抑制，以及是否存在被掩埋的星暴活动。
AI.method: 使用ALMA对SQuIGGLE巡天中的9个富气体后星暴星系进行CO(5-4)观测，结合已有的CO(2-1)数据，分析分子气体激发水平(r52)与恒星形成率的关系。
AI.result: 在9个目标中检测到8个的CO(5-4)，大多数星系具有中等激发水平(r52≈0.1-0.3)，与恒星形成率无明显关联。所有星系都有紧凑、适度的恒星形成活动。一个具有活动星系核的星系是例外，其r52≈0.6。
AI.conclusion: 大多数富气体后星暴星系具有中等激发的分子气体和少量到适度的恒星形成活动，表明剩余气体中的恒星形成效率相对抑制，而非存在强烈的被掩埋星暴活动。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究z~0.7后星暴星系的分子气体激发，使用ALMA CO(5-4)观测，与用户兴趣画像中的分子气体、星暴星系、ALMA等关键词高度匹配，且作者Desika Narayanan在核心作者列表中。虽然用户主要关注强引力透镜和高红移星系，但论文主题与分子气体和星暴星系密切相关，属于用户兴趣的扩展领域。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题为后星暴星系的分子气体激发，与用户兴趣画像中的分子气体、星暴星系、ALMA等关键词高度匹配，但未直接涉及强引力透镜或高红移星系动力学。
recommendation.method_fit: 使用ALMA进行CO(5-4)观测，与用户兴趣中的ALMA观测方法一致，但未涉及引力透镜技术。
recommendation.author_fit: 作者Desika Narayanan在用户核心作者列表中，权重较高，其他作者如Rachel Bezanson、Justin S. Spilker等虽不在核心列表中，但属于相关领域。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文提供了z~0.7后星暴星系分子气体激发的新观测结果，具有较高的新颖性，但未涉及高红移星系动力学或引力透镜。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或高红移极化等用户优先关注的主题，且红移较低（z~0.7）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 许多红移约0.7的后星暴星系已被证明保留了大量的分子气体储库，但宿主着低水平的持续恒星形成，这表明在早期后星暴阶段，剩余气体可能无法有效形成恒星。我们展示了来自“研究中等红移星系熄灭：气体、角动量和演化”（SQuIGG\vec{L}E）巡天的九个富气体后星暴星系（红移约0.7）的新阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米阵列CO(5-4)观测结果，提供了这些系统中分子气体激发的视角。结合现有的CO(2-1)数据，我们在8/9个目标中探测到CO(5-4)，并发现大多数具有中等CO激发，其$r_{52}\equiv L'_{\rm CO(5-4)}/L'_{\rm CO(2-1)}\approx0.1-0.3$。这些系统在$r_{52}$与总恒星形成或恒星形成面密度之间没有显示出明显的趋势。具体而言，所有天体的$\Sigma_{\mathrm{SFR}} \sim 0.01-1\ \text{M}_\odot\ \text{yr}^{-1}\ \text{kpc}^{-2}$，与紧凑、适度的恒星形成一致，即使考虑到被掩埋的活动，这些星系正从其峰值衰退。一个天体J1448+1010具有明确的光学、中红外和射电活动星系核指标，是一个异常值，其$r_{52}\approx0.6$；其升高的激发很可能需要显著的非恒星加热，并可能有潜在被掩埋恒星形成的贡献。总之，大多数富气体SQuIGG\vec{L}E后星暴星系具有中等激发的分子气体以及少量到适度的恒星形成活动，表明剩余气体中的恒星形成效率相对抑制，而非存在强烈的被掩埋星暴活动。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，大多数富气体后星暴星系具有中等激发的分子气体和少量到适度的恒星形成活动，表明剩余气体中的恒星形成效率相对抑制，而非存在强烈的被掩埋星暴活动。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: SFR vs. H 2 gas mass (left) for all CO(2–1) SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E measurements (blue diamonds) and nondetections (blue triangles), with the nine PSBs targeted in this work outlined in orange. We include for comparison star-forming galaxies at \(\langle z\rangle\sim 1.2\) from PHIBSS/PHIBSS2 (gray triangles; Tacconi et al. 2013 ) along with \(z\sim 0\) massive galaxies from COLDGASS (white circles; Saintonge et al. 2011 ). Black dashed lines indicate constant molecular gas depletion timescales ( \(\tau_{{dep}}\equiv{M}_{{H_{2}}}/{SFR}\) ). \(M_{{H}_{2}}\) vs. time since quenching \(t_{q}\) (right) for the same sample. H 2 masses are taken from Bezanson et al. ( 2022 ) and (Setton et al. , 2025 ) , while SFR and \(t_{q}\) values are from Suess et al. ( 2022a ) . Median uncertainties for the entire SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E ALMA sample are shown for both panels (black cross). The selected systems are among the most gas-rich and youngest PSBs in the SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E sample.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图显示所有CO(2–1) SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E探测（蓝色菱形）和非探测（蓝色三角形）的SFR与H 2气体质量的关系，本工作中针对的九个PSB以橙色标出。我们还包括了来自PHIBSS/PHIBSS2（灰色三角形；Tacconi et al. 2013）的红移\(\langle z\rangle\sim 1.2\)恒星形成星系，以及来自COLDGASS（白色圆圈；Saintonge et al. 2011）的\(z\sim 0\)大质量星系作为比较。黑色虚线表示恒定的分子气体消耗时标（\(\tau_{{dep}}\equiv{M}_{{H_{2}}}/{SFR}\)）。右图显示相同样本的\(M_{{H}_{2}}\)与自熄灭以来的时间\(t_{q}\)的关系。H 2质量取自Bezanson et al. (2022)和(Setton et al., 2025)，而SFR和\(t_{q}\)值来自Suess et al. (2022a)。两个面板均显示了整个SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E ALMA样本的中位不确定度（黑色十字）。所选系统是SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E样本中气体最丰富和最年轻的PSB之一。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: ALMA CO properties for nine gas-rich SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E PSBs.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：九个富气体SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E PSB的ALMA CO性质。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The left panels show integrated emission contours of ALMA CO(2–1) (blue) and CO(5–4) (orange), and where available CO (4–3) (green), overlaid on best available optical cutouts ( \(14^{\prime\prime}\times 14^{\prime\prime}\) ) from HSC \(i\) -band (Aihara et al. , 2018 ) or HST WFC3/IR F110W (Suess et al. , 2022a ; D’Onofrio et al. , 2025 ; Setton et al. , 2025 ) . Contours are shown at 3, 4, and 5 \(\sigma\) for each line, and the respective ALMA synthesized beams are indicated in the lower left corner. The right panels show the extracted spectra of the respective CO data cubes.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图显示ALMA CO(2–1)（蓝色）和CO(5–4)（橙色）以及可用时的CO(4–3)（绿色）的积分发射等值线，叠加在来自HSC \(i\)波段（Aihara et al., 2018）或HST WFC3/IR F110W（Suess et al., 2022a；D’Onofrio et al., 2025；Setton et al., 2025）的最佳可用光学剪裁图像（\(14^{\prime\prime}\times 14^{\prime\prime}\)）上。每条谱线的等值线显示在3、4和5 \(\sigma\)处，相应的ALMA综合波束在左下角标出。右图显示相应CO数据立方体的提取光谱。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: CO SLEDs and excitation ratio distributions for the nine SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E PSBs. The left panel shows the CO SLEDs constructed from the CO(2–1) and CO(5–4) transitions (and CO(4–3) where available). The SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E PSBs are shown as orange circles (with the nondetection shown as an orange hatched triangle), with the AGN J1448+1010 outlined in blue. We compare to \(z\sim 1.25\) MS (black squares) and SB (gray squares) galaxies (Valentino et al. , 2020 ) , the Milky Way inner disk (black dashed line; Fixsen et al. 1999 ), the thermalized \(S_{CO}\propto J^{2}\) relation (dotted gray line), the model excitation sequence from Narayanan and Krumholz ( 2014 ) spanning \(\Sigma_{SFR}=0.1-10\,{M_{\odot}\,yr^{-1}\,kpc^{-2}}\) (gray curve; dashed and dashed-dotted lines represent lower and upper bounds, respectively), and the nearby shocked PSB system NGC 1266 (red diamonds; Alatalo et al. 2011 ; Pellegrini et al. 2013 ). The middle panel shows the distribution of \(L^{\prime}_{{CO(5-4)}}/L^{\prime}_{{CO(2-1)}}\) for the SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E PSBs (with J1448+1010 outlined in blue) and the \(z\sim 1.25\) comparison galaxies, while the right panel shows the cumulative distributions for the same samples. The single nondetection is included in the histogram (orange hatched bin) and the cumulative distribution at the \(3\sigma\) limit; however, the AGN J1448+1010 is not included in the latter. Overall, the sample is comprised of mostly moderate excitation CO SLEDs, with a single high excitation outlier in the AGN host J1448+1010.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：九个SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E PSB的CO SLED和激发比分布。左图显示由CO(2–1)和CO(5–4)跃迁（以及可用时的CO(4–3)）构建的CO SLED。SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E PSB以橙色圆圈显示（非探测以橙色阴影三角形显示），AGN J1448+1010以蓝色标出。我们与\(z\sim 1.25\)主序星系（黑色方块）和星暴星系（灰色方块）（Valentino et al., 2020）、银河系内盘（黑色虚线；Fixsen et al. 1999）、热化\(S_{CO}\propto J^{2}\)关系（灰色虚线）、来自Narayanan and Krumholz (2014)的覆盖\(\Sigma_{SFR}=0.1-10\,{M_{\odot}\,yr^{-1}\,kpc^{-2}}\)的模型激发序列（灰色曲线；虚线和点划线分别表示下界和上界），以及邻近的激波PSB系统NGC 1266（红色菱形；Alatalo et al. 2011；Pellegrini et al. 2013）进行比较。中图显示SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E PSB（J1448+1010以蓝色标出）和\(z\sim 1.25\)比较星系的\(L^{\prime}_{{CO(5-4)}}/L^{\prime}_{{CO(2-1)}}\)分布，右图显示相同样本的累积分布。单个非探测包含在直方图（橙色阴影条）和\(3\sigma\)极限的累积分布中；然而，AGN J1448+1010未包含在后者的累积分布中。总体而言，该样本主要由中等激发的CO SLED组成，在AGN宿主J1448+1010中有一个高激发异常值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The left panel shows \(L^{\prime}_{{CO(5-4)}}/L^{\prime}_{{CO(2-1)}}\) against total SFR, showing both the non-buried (white circles) and buried (orange circles) SFR estimates (Setton et al. , 2025 ) . In the right panel we show the excitation ratio versus \(\Sigma_{SFR}\) computed using CO(5–4) source sizes (see Table 1 ). As in Figure 3 , the AGN J1448+1010 is outlined in blue. Both panels include \(z\sim 1.25\) MS (gray squares) and SB (black squares) comparison galaxies from Valentino et al. ( 2020 ) and the shocked PSB NGC 1266 (red diamond; Alatalo et al. 2011 ; Pellegrini et al. 2013 ; Alatalo 2015 ) for reference. The right panel additionally shows the observed trend from Valentino et al. ( 2020 ) and the excitation model from Narayanan and Krumholz ( 2014 ) . Black crosses indicate median uncertainties for the SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E objects; for the SFR and \(\Sigma_{SFR}\) axes, solid and dashed bars indicate those for the buried and non-buried values, respectively. Together, no clear trend is observed between the CO excitation and both total or surface-density SFR for SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E PSBs, where instead all systems are consistent with little to modest star-forming activity.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左图显示\(L^{\prime}_{{CO(5-4)}}/L^{\prime}_{{CO(2-1)}}\)与总SFR的关系，显示了非被掩埋（白色圆圈）和被掩埋（橙色圆圈）的SFR估计值（Setton et al., 2025）。右图显示激发比与使用CO(5–4)源大小计算的\(\Sigma_{SFR}\)的关系（见表1）。如图3所示，AGN J1448+1010以蓝色标出。两个面板均包括来自Valentino et al. (2020)的\(z\sim 1.25\)主序星系（灰色方块）和星暴星系（黑色方块）以及激波PSB NGC 1266（红色菱形；Alatalo et al. 2011；Pellegrini et al. 2013；Alatalo 2015）作为参考。右图还显示了来自Valentino et al. (2020)的观测趋势和来自Narayanan and Krumholz (2014)的激发模型。黑色十字表示SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E天体的中位不确定度；对于SFR和\(\Sigma_{SFR}\)轴，实线和虚线分别表示被掩埋和非被掩埋值的不确定度。总之，在SQuIGG \(\vec{L}\) E PSB中，CO激发与总SFR或SFR面密度之间未观察到明显趋势，相反，所有系统均与少量到适度的恒星形成活动一致。

authors: Floris F. S. van der Tak
title: Linear filament and nested cluster evolution tomography (LANCET) I. Capture the evolution of dense gas in 14-parsec filament G316.8
comment: 12 pages, 8 figures. Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: A dynamic view of mass assembly is essential for understanding the formation of massive stars and clusters. Interpreting evolutionary diagnostics from Galactic-wide surveys, however, requires careful control of distance and environmental variations. The G316.8 filament provides an ideal laboratory: a 14-pc nearly linear structure composed of three contiguous subregions with comparable molecular gas reservoirs (~10,000 $M_\odot$ each) but spanning a clear evolutionary sequence from an infrared dark cloud (young) through a massive young stellar object (intermediate) to an HII region (evolved). As part of the Linear filament and nested cluster evolution tomography (LANCET) project, we mapped the full filament with the Atacama Compact Array at 1.3 mm, achieving 0.08 pc resolution over 17.1 pc$^2$. Combined with Herschel and APEX/ArTéMiS data, we derived high-resolution temperature and column-density maps. We quantify structural evolution using dense-fragment statistics, column-density PDFs, and $Δ$-variance analysis. From young to evolved regions, the maximum fragment mass increases from 8 to 490 $M_\odot$, while the dense-gas mass fraction ($>0.5$ g cm$^{-2}$) rises from 0.4% to 9.6%. The N-PDF develops a secondary power-law tail and the $Δ$-variance slope becomes progressively shallower, indicating ongoing assembly of dense sub-parsec structures. Our further ALMA 12m continuum and spectral line data will extend this dynamic scenarios down to 800 AU scale.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过多波段观测G316.8线状分子云，揭示了三个连续亚区域从年轻到演化的星团形成动态过程，展示了致密气体质量分数和最大碎片质量的显著增长。
AI.motivation: 理解大质量恒星和星团的形成需要动态视角，但银河系巡天数据的演化诊断需要控制距离和环境变化的影响。G316.8线状分子云提供了理想实验室：它由三个连续亚区域组成，具有可比的气体质量但呈现清晰的演化序列。
AI.method: 使用Atacama Compact Array在1.3毫米波段对全长14pc的线状结构进行映射，分辨率达0.08pc。结合Herschel和APEX/ArTéMiS数据，推导高分辨率温度和柱密度图。通过致密碎片统计、柱密度PDF和Δ-方差分析量化结构演化。
AI.result: 从年轻到演化区域：最大碎片质量从8增加到490M⊙；致密气体质量分数（>0.5 g cm⁻²）从0.4%上升到9.6%；N-PDF发展出次级幂律尾，Δ-方差斜率逐渐变浅，表明亚秒差距尺度致密结构的持续组装。
AI.conclusion: G316.8线状分子云展示了星团形成的动态演化序列，致密气体分数和碎片质量的系统变化揭示了质量组装过程。进一步的ALMA数据将把这种动态场景扩展到800AU尺度。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究银河系内分子云G316.8中的致密气体和恒星形成，属于银河系天文学和恒星形成领域。用户的主要兴趣是强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移星系运动学、高红移偏振和高红移多相气体。论文主题（银河系内分子云、恒星形成）与用户的核心兴趣（高红移星系、强引力透镜）几乎没有重叠。论文方法（ALMA、Herschel、APEX观测）虽然涉及ALMA，但用户兴趣中的ALMA特指用于高红移透镜星系研究。论文作者与用户核心作者列表无交集。因此，该论文与用户的研究方向严重不匹配。
recommendation.topic_fit: 不匹配。论文主题为银河系内分子云和恒星形成，用户核心兴趣为高红移星系、强引力透镜、星系动力学和运动学。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。论文使用ALMA、Herschel、APEX进行银河系内分子云观测，而用户兴趣中的ALMA主要用于高红移透镜星系研究。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。论文作者与用户核心作者列表无交集。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文在银河系恒星形成领域具有新颖性，但与用户的研究领域无关。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题（银河系内分子云、恒星形成）与用户核心兴趣（高红移星系、强引力透镜）严重偏离。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 质量组装的动态视角对于理解大质量恒星和星团的形成至关重要。然而，从银河系范围的巡天中解读演化诊断，需要仔细控制距离和环境变化。G316.8纤维状结构提供了一个理想的实验室：一个14秒差距的近乎线性的结构，由三个相邻的子区域组成，每个子区域拥有相当的分子气体库（约10,000 $M_\odot$），但跨越了从红外暗云（年轻）到大质量年轻恒星体（中等）再到HII区（演化）的清晰演化序列。作为线性纤维和嵌套星团演化层析成像（LANCET）项目的一部分，我们使用阿塔卡马紧凑阵列在1.3毫米波段对整个纤维状结构进行了成像，在17.1 pc$^2$范围内实现了0.08秒差距的分辨率。结合赫歇尔和APEX/ArTéMiS数据，我们推导出了高分辨率的温度和柱密度图。我们使用致密碎片统计、柱密度概率分布函数和$Δ$-方差分析来量化结构演化。从年轻区域到演化区域，最大碎片质量从8 $M_\odot$增加到490 $M_\odot$，而致密气体质量分数（$>0.5$ g cm$^{-2}$）从0.4%上升到9.6%。柱密度概率分布函数发展出一个次级幂律尾，$Δ$-方差斜率逐渐变缓，表明致密的亚秒差距尺度结构正在持续组装。我们进一步的ALMA 12米连续谱和谱线数据将把这种动态情景扩展到800天文单位尺度。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，G316.8线状分子云展示了星团形成的动态演化序列，致密气体分数和碎片质量的系统变化揭示了质量组装过程。进一步的ALMA数据将把这种动态场景扩展到800天文单位尺度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Background color map composites of Spitzer 3.6 and 5.8 \(\mu\) m and Herschel 70 \(\mu\) m images. The overlaid white contours show the high-resolution H 2 column density map obtained from Sect. 4.1 with levels of 3.0, 5.0, 8.0, 12.6, and \(20.0\times 10^{22}\) cm -2 . The blue, orange, and red boxes outline the young, intermediate, and evolved parts, respectively. Massive clumps embedded in each part are shown with color ellipses. The yellow contours show MeerKAT 1.28 GHz continuum emission at levels of 100, 180, and 260 mJy beam -1 (8″). The orange cross shows the G316.763 \(-\) 0.011 maser spot for OH and H 2 O, while the red cross shows the G316.812 \(-\) 0.057 maser spot for OH, CH 3 OH, and H 2 O.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：斯皮策3.6和5.8 \(\mu\) m以及赫歇尔70 \(\mu\) m图像的背景色图合成。叠加的白色等高线显示了从第4.1节获得的高分辨率H 2柱密度图，等高线水平为3.0、5.0、8.0、12.6和\(20.0\times 10^{22}\) cm -2。蓝色、橙色和红色框分别勾勒出年轻、中等和演化部分。每个部分内嵌的大质量团块用彩色椭圆表示。黄色等高线显示了MeerKAT 1.28 GHz连续谱发射，水平为100、180和260 mJy beam -1（8″）。橙色十字表示G316.763 \(-\) 0.011的OH和H 2 O脉泽点，而红色十字表示G316.812 \(-\) 0.057的OH、CH 3 OH和H 2 O脉泽点。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Physical properties of the three subregions 1 1 1 Y: young; I: intermediate; E: evolved. Size: Length and width of filamentary clouds. \(M_{cloud}\) : Subregion cloud mass. \(L_{FIR}\) : Far-infrared luminosity. \(\langle N_{H_{2}}\rangle\) : Mean column density of the region. \(\langle n_{H_{2}}\rangle\) : Mean volume density assuming depth equal to width. \(\langle T_{dust}\rangle\) : Mean dust temperature throughout the subregion. \(L_{FIR}/M_{cloud}\) : FIR luminosity-to-mass ratio calculated at cloud scale. \(L_{bol}/M_{clump}\) : Bolometric luminosity-to-mass ratio calculated at clump scale of \(0.2{-}0.4\) pc.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：三个子区域的物理性质 1 1 1 Y：年轻；I：中等；E：演化。大小：纤维状云的长度和宽度。\(M_{cloud}\)：子区域云质量。\(L_{FIR}\)：远红外光度。\(\langle N_{H_{2}}\rangle\)：该区域的平均柱密度。\(\langle n_{H_{2}}\rangle\)：假设深度等于宽度的平均体积密度。\(\langle T_{dust}\rangle\)：整个子区域的平均尘埃温度。\(L_{FIR}/M_{cloud}\)：在云尺度上计算的远红外光度与质量比。\(L_{bol}/M_{clump}\)：在\(0.2{-}0.4\) pc的团块尺度上计算的辐射光度与质量比。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : ACA 7m continuum emission at 1.3 mm overlaid on the composite Spitzer 3.6 \(\mu\) m and 5.8 \(\mu\) m emission and Herschel 70 \(\mu\) m emission. The 1.3 mm map is shown with filled contours at levels of 10, 20, 40, 80, 160, and 320 mJy beam -1 . The mosaicked field of view is outlined by primary beam response (yellow contour at 0.2). The white contours define the dense region at levels of \(3.0\) and \(5.0\times 10^{22}\) cm -2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：ACA 7米阵列在1.3毫米波段的连续谱发射，叠加在斯皮策3.6 \(\mu\) m和5.8 \(\mu\) m发射以及赫歇尔70 \(\mu\) m发射上。1.3毫米图以填充等高线显示，水平为10、20、40、80、160和320 mJy beam -1。拼接视场由主波束响应（黄色等高线，0.2处）勾勒。白色等高线定义了致密区域，水平为\(3.0\)和\(5.0\times 10^{22}\) cm -2。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Comparison between low-resolution and multi-resolution maps of dust temperature (upper) and H 2 column density (lower). The white and yellow polygons indicate the fields of view of the APEX and our ACA 7m observations, respectively. For the temperature image, the resolution is 18 \(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\) 2 inside and 36 \(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\) 3 outside the white closed polygon. For the column density image, the resolution outside the yellow closed polygon is the same as the temperature map but as high as \(6\arcsec\) within the yellow closed polygon.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：尘埃温度（上）和H 2柱密度（下）的低分辨率与多分辨率图比较。白色和黄色多边形分别表示APEX和我们ACA 7米观测的视场。对于温度图像，白色闭合多边形内部的分辨率为18 \(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\) 2，外部为36 \(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\) 3。对于柱密度图像，黄色闭合多边形外部的分辨率与温度图相同，但在黄色闭合多边形内部高达\(6\arcsec\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : High-resolution column density images zoomed-in toward the three subregions: young (left), intermediate (middle), and evolved (right). The \(6\arcsec\) resolution is shown in the bottom left corner. The white contours show MeerKAT 1.28 GHz continuum emission at levels of 100, 180, and 260 mJy beam -1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：朝向三个子区域放大的高分辨率柱密度图像：年轻（左）、中等（中）和演化（右）。左下角显示了\(6\arcsec\)分辨率。白色等高线显示了MeerKAT 1.28 GHz连续谱发射，水平为100、180和260 mJy beam -1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Result of source extraction by astrodendro . Left : Dendrogram plot highlighting the leaf structures and their locations. Right : ID numbers and region masks (red contours) overlaid on the 1.3 mm continuum map.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：由astrodendro进行的源提取结果。左：树状图突出显示了叶状结构及其位置。右：ID编号和区域掩模（红色等高线）叠加在1.3毫米连续谱图上。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Catalog of astrodendro leaves 5 5 5 The ID is sorted in descending order of flux density \(F_{\nu}\) . \(\theta_{maj}\) , \(\theta_{min}\) : Measured major and minor FWHM. PA: Position angle of the elliptical model. \(R_{\theta}\) : Geometric mean FWHM in angular scale. \(R_{p}\) : Geometric mean FWHM in physical scale. \(R_{\theta,\ dec}\) : Deconvolved geometric mean FWHM in angular scale. \(R_{p,\ dec}\) : Deconvolved geometric mean FWHM in physical scale. \(\langle T^{leaf}_{dust}\rangle\) : Mean dust temperature of the leaf. \(M_{leaf}\) : Dendrogram leaf mass calculated from monochromatic flux. \(M_{enc}\) : Dendrogram leaf calculated from enclosed pixels. \(\mathcal{R}\) : Region flag (Y for young, I for intermediate, and E for evolved). Only the first ten rows are shown; the complete version will be published in CDS.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：astrodendro叶状结构目录 5 5 5 ID按流量密度\(F_{\nu}\)降序排列。\(\theta_{maj}\)、\(\theta_{min}\)：测量的长轴和短轴半高全宽。PA：椭圆模型的位置角。\(R_{\theta}\)：角尺度上的几何平均半高全宽。\(R_{p}\)：物理尺度上的几何平均半高全宽。\(R_{\theta,\ dec}\)：角尺度上的去卷积几何平均半高全宽。\(R_{p,\ dec}\)：物理尺度上的去卷积几何平均半高全宽。\(\langle T^{leaf}_{dust}\rangle\)：叶状结构的平均尘埃温度。\(M_{leaf}\)：根据单色流量计算的树状图叶状结构质量。\(M_{enc}\)：根据封闭像素计算的树状图叶状结构质量。\(\mathcal{R}\)：区域标志（Y表示年轻，I表示中等，E表示演化）。仅显示前十行；完整版本将在CDS中发布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : N-PDFs for the entire region before and after background subtraction shown in gray and black. N-PDFs for the northern quiet and southern active parts are shown in blue and red. The best-fitting models and their posterior \(1\sigma\) confidence intervals are shown with lines and shading. Visual extinction is also shown on the top axis.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：整个区域在背景扣除前后的柱密度概率分布函数，分别以灰色和黑色显示。北部安静部分和南部活跃部分的柱密度概率分布函数分别以蓝色和红色显示。最佳拟合模型及其后验\(1\sigma\)置信区间以线条和阴影显示。顶部轴也显示了视觉消光。
